SUSTAINABILITY Our World FAQS COCKTAILS CUBA LIBRE GOLD RUM BACARDÍ Carta Oro The Maestros de Ron BACARDÍ craft BACARDÍ Carta Oro’s rich flavours and golden complexion in toasted oak barrels. The secret behind its unique mellow character? A blend of charcoals known only to them. VIDEO HOW TO MAKE A CUBA LIBRE SIP THE SUNSHINE Tasting Notes BACARDÍ Carta Oro rum brings together rich, soothing flavours like vanilla, buttery caramel, toasted almond and sweet banana notes balanced by the warm zest of orange peel and a light, oaky finish. Nose Nuts and butter Palate Rich and toasted Finish Dry and slightly sweet THE SECRET TO BACARDÍ CARTA ORO'S MELLOW CHARACTER LIES WITHIN A UNIQUE BLEND OF CHARCOAL. BACARDÍ Cocktails MADE OF GOLD A rum that’s best for bursts of flavour. BACARDÍ Carta Oro craves zesty, punchy, and bold cocktails to acquaint with. View all cocktails Cuba Libre Ginger Snap Rum Toddy Drag to discover more View all cocktails SOCIAL MOVE WITH US A soft sway, or a lively dance. We have something for everyone. Follow us on social to stay up-to-date with the latest BACARDÍ news. #DoWhatMovesYou EXPLORE THE A-Z OF RUM COCKTAILS From Air Mail to Zombie, do you know your BACARDÍ alphabet? DISCOVER MORE OUR RECOMMENDED RUMS LIKE THIS? TRY THESE If you enjoy this rum, here’s our recommendations of other BACARDĺ rums we think you’ll like VIEW OUR RUMS BACARDÍ Carta Blanca BACARDÍ Carta Negra BACARDÍ SPICED BACARDÍ AÑEJO CUATRO BACARDÍ RESERVA OCHO VIEW OUR RUMS MERCHANDISE GET KITTED OUT Glasses. Squeezers. Cocktail kits. Discover everything you need to create standout BACARDÍ cocktails. SHOP NOW FAQ CURIOUS ABOUT RUM? WHAT IS GOLD RUM? Gold rum, also known as amber rum, usually provides rich and smooth flavors after being aged in barrels. WHAT IS THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN DARK, GOLD AND WHITE RUM? Rum is a wonderfully complex and diverse spirit. Color can give us clues about time spent aging or the flavors that might be found within. Dark can be bold, sweet (or dry) and even smoky, gold is rich and soothing, and white is smooth, subtle and often refreshing. But color can be misleading. The best way to truly understand a rum is to taste it for yourself. HOW DO YOU MAKE RUM? Rum is made using only three ingredients: molasses from sugarcane, yeast and water. Ingredients are fermented, then distilled, aged, filtered and blended. metadata.description: A soothing rum balanced with notes of buttery caramel and zesty orange. BACARDÍ Gold ignites your glass with the flavors of sunshine.
